metadata.description: Azure Architecture Diagram Builder — User Feedback Trends workbook. Visualizes the App Insights custom event 'User_Feedback' (rating, category, hasComment, commentLength). Verbatim comment text is NOT in App Insights — it is stored durably in Cosmos DB (feedback container).
Full resource ID of the Application Insights component the workbook is scoped to.
Display name shown in the App Insights workbooks gallery.
Stable GUID so re-deploys update the same workbook instead of creating duplicates.

content.json:
## 📊 User Feedback Trends
Sentiment and engagement from the in-app **Share Feedback** modal (App Insights event `User_Feedback`).

> ℹ️ Verbatim comment **text** is stored in Cosmos DB (the `feedback` container), not here — this workbook shows the rating, category, whether a comment was left, and its length.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating), hasComment = tostring(customDimensions.hasComment), commentLength = toint(customMeasurements.commentLength)
| summarize ['Total feedback'] = count(), ['Avg rating'] = round(avg(rating), 2), ['% with comment'] = round(100.0 * countif(hasComment == 'true') / count(), 1), ['Avg comment length'] = round(avg(commentLength), 0)
content.title: At a glance

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating)
| summarize ['Avg rating'] = avg(rating) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Average rating over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating)
| summarize Count = count() by Rating
| order by Rating asc
content.title: Rating distribution (1–5)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Category = tostring(customDimensions.category)
| summarize Count = count() by Category
| order by Count desc
content.title: Feedback by category

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend hasComment = tostring(customDimensions.hasComment), commentLength = toint(customMeasurements.commentLength)
| summarize Total = count(), WithComment = countif(hasComment == 'true'), ['Avg comment length'] = round(avg(commentLength), 0) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend ['% with comment'] = round(100.0 * WithComment / Total, 1)
| project timestamp, ['% with comment'], ['Avg comment length']
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Comment engagement over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Rating = toint(customMeasurements.rating), Category = tostring(customDimensions.category), HasComment = tostring(customDimensions.hasComment), ['Comment length'] = toint(customMeasurements.commentLength)
| project timestamp, Rating, Category, HasComment, ['Comment length']
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent feedback (latest 100)

content.json:
## 🌍 Geography
Where usage and feedback come from. The **overall reach** tiles exclude the Azure datacenter cluster (`Boydton` / Microsoft network egress) and masked IPs, so they reflect genuine external users. Raw IPs are intentionally not shown (PII) — only country/city aggregates.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'User_Feedback'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count(), ['Avg rating'] = round(avg(toint(customMeasurements.rating)), 2) by Country = client_CountryOrRegion, ['City/Region'] = strcat(client_City, ', ', client_StateOrProvince)
| order by Count desc
content.title: Feedback by location

content.query:
union pageViews, customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where client_City != 'Boydton' and client_IP != '0.0.0.0' and isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| summarize Sessions = dcount(session_Id), ['Distinct IPs'] = dcount(client_IP), Events = count() by Country = client_CountryOrRegion
| order by Sessions desc
| take 50
content.title: Overall reach — external users by country

content.query:
union pageViews, customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where client_City != 'Boydton' and client_IP != '0.0.0.0' and isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| summarize Sessions = dcount(session_Id) by client_CountryOrRegion
| order by Sessions desc
content.title: Overall reach — world map (sessions)
